title: Claude workflow orchestration
description: Runtime-gated Claude Code workflow orchestration policy for execution waves. Default-off; blocks known-unsafe manual background-agent dispatch when Claude Code agent teams are active.

workflow.claude_orchestration.description: Enable Claude Code orchestration policy during execute waves.

workflow.claude_orchestration_backend.description: Backend selected when Claude orchestration is enabled: auto and inline use the current inline dispatch preflight slice; workflow is reserved and fail-closed until the generated Workflow executor is implemented.
